parameters.command:
bash -lc '
python3 << EOF
import os, json, subprocess
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime, timezone

memory_dir = Path(os.path.expanduser("~/.claude/projects/-home-maverick-projects-iOPEX/memory"))
nexus_core = Path(os.path.expanduser("~/projects/nexus-core"))

results = []

# Check nexus-core memory vs last git commit
try:
    commit_ts = subprocess.check_output(
        ["git", "-C", str(nexus_core), "log", "-1", "--format=%ct"],
        text=True
    ).strip()
    commit_dt = datetime.fromtimestamp(int(commit_ts), tz=timezone.utc)
    mem_file = memory_dir / "project_nexus_core.md"
    if mem_file.exists():
        mem_dt = datetime.fromtimestamp(mem_file.stat().st_mtime, tz=timezone.utc)
        age_hours = (commit_dt - mem_dt).total_seconds() / 3600
        if age_hours > 0:
            results.append({"file": "project_nexus_core.md", "stale_hours": round(age_hours, 1), "last_commit": commit_dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M UTC")})
    else:
        results.append({"file": "project_nexus_core.md", "stale_hours": 9999, "last_commit": "memory file missing"})
except Exception as e:
    results.append({"file": "project_nexus_core.md", "stale_hours": -1, "error": str(e)})

# Check TOOLS.md vs nexus-core last commit
try:
    tools_file = Path(os.path.expanduser("~/.openclaw/workspace/TOOLS.md"))
    if tools_file.exists():
        tools_dt = datetime.fromtimestamp(tools_file.stat().st_mtime, tz=timezone.utc)
        age_hours = (commit_dt - tools_dt).total_seconds() / 3600
        if age_hours > 24:
            results.append({"file": "TOOLS.md", "stale_hours": round(age_hours, 1), "last_commit": commit_dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M UTC")})
except Exception as e:
    results.append({"file": "TOOLS.md", "stale_hours": -1, "error": str(e)})

print(json.dumps({"stale": results, "all_fresh": len(results) == 0}))
EOF
'

_meta.description: Sunday 9AM — compares memory file timestamps to last nexus-core git commit. Alerts via Telegram if docs are stale. Silent if all fresh.
